activities.title: Spawn Worker At Project Root
activities.description: spawnWorker 以捕獲自 Instance.directory 的 project root 為 cwd 啟動 worker 進程；directory 缺失時 fail loud (task.ts:835-842, DD-1/DD-2)

activities.title: Inject Working Directory Anchor
activities.description: 在 getPreloadParts 注入絕對 working-directory 區塊，使 main agent 與 subagent preface 同時帶 repo root 錨點 (preloaded-context.ts, DD-3)

activities.title: Monitor Worker Progress
activities.description: proc-watchdog 偵測連續 tool-error/identical-signature；paralysis detector 偵測 tool-active 但零 file-mutation (task.ts:2158+, prompt.ts, DD-4/DD-5)

activities.title: Terminate Stalled Worker
activities.description: no-progress 成立時 reap worker，finish reason 為 no_progress_timeout，或 detector 注入 nudge 促脫離 (DD-4/DD-5/DD-6)
